nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Register this URL in ManageCallAI under Automation → Webhooks. Subscribe to ivr_flow.published.

nodes.name: Verify Signature
nodes.notes: Set MANAGECALL_WEBHOOK_SECRET in n8n environment variables.

nodes.name: Fetch Flow Details
nodes.notes: Credential type: Header Auth. Header name: Authorization. Value: Bearer <api_key>.

nodes.name: Notify Slack

body.text: :white_check_mark: IVR flow *{{ $('Fetch Flow Details').item.json.data.name }}* (v{{ $json.body.data.version_number }}) published by {{ $json.body.data.triggered_by_type }}.

nodes.notes: Set SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL in n8n environment variables.
